note: Surface-completeness triage for Uniswap V3 NonfungiblePositionManager mainnet. Permission primitives and user liquidity/fund movement paths are COVER. Pool creation and pool mint callback are EXCLUDE because they do not model a direct wallet fund/permission risk in ScopeBall's pre-sign ActionBody layer.
